title: A fully automated home cage for long-term continuous phenotyping of mouse cognition and behavior

screening.reason: The paper describes an automated home cage system but does not report specific behavioral outcomes related to social behavior in mice.
matched_inclusion_criteria: Studies mice or rats in a home-cage or semi-natural automated monitoring setting
matched_exclusion_criteria: No automated monitoring or no behavioral outcome

overall_concept_summary: The paper introduces an automated system for long-term phenotyping of mouse behavior and cognition, but does not focus on social behavior.
methods_summary: Describes the development of a fully automated home cage system for continuous monitoring of mouse behavior and cognition over extended periods.
relevance_to_review: Weakly relevant as it describes an automated monitoring system but does not report specific social behavior outcomes in mice.
key_takeaways: The paper introduces a new automated home cage for long-term phenotyping of mouse cognition and behavior.
methods: Continuous monitoring of mouse behavior and cognition
missing_information: No specific behavioral outcomes related to social behavior in mice are reported.
